name: Org-Aims Aligner
title: Aligner — Org-Operations Twin
flavor_text: Turns noisy signal into aligned aims. One north star, measured weekly.

abilities.name: Align
abilities.text: Map every incoming aim to a single north-star objective; drop what doesn't ladder up.

abilities.name: Prioritize
abilities.text: Rank aims by impact-over-effort; cut the bottom quartile without apology.

abilities.name: Signal
abilities.text: Ingest raw org chatter — tickets, notes, metrics — and separate signal from noise.

abilities.name: Report-up
abilities.text: Publish a one-page north-star readout: aims, owners, key results, status.
